General.Name: Raffles Interior Limited
General.Description: Raffles Interior Limited, an investment holding company, provides interior fitting-out services in Singapore and Malaysia. It offers project and construction management services; and interior fitting-out services, including manufacture and/or installation of ceiling, carpentry, joinery, plastering, floor finishing, woodworks, steel and metal works, painting works, sanitary fittings and wares, MEP works, and other associated works, as well as structural works, such as staircases. The company also manufactures, customizes, and supplies carpentry/joinery and integral fixtures, as well as upholstery works; and maintenance services for interior fitting-out projects. It serves premises in the private commercial sector comprising commercial and light-industrial properties; construction contractors; and professional consultants. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Singapore.
General.Address: No. 01-02/03, 5 Sungei Kadut Street 2, Singapore, Singapore, 729227
